Appearances:
Plaintiff Bing Fun Chen is present.
Attorney Joanna Kozubal for the plaintiff.
Defendant Adam Pappie is present.
Attorney Benjamin Diamond appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of AUG-11-2014 is vacated. (501/JPT)
